title: NEW ROADS DROP-IN CENTER - 211info
text: NEW ROADS NEW ROADS DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in center with laundry facilities, phone use, temporary mailing address, showers, and daily meals. Also provides street outreach, case management, mental health counseling, education, and assistance finding housing. Eligible youth will be added to a central housing referral list for all programs they qualify for. 941 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Homeless and at-risk youth ages 16-24 Hours: -Drop-in Center: 7 days per week 8:30am-5pm -Breakfast: 7 days per week 8:30am-9:30am -Lunch: 7 days per week noon-1pm -Snack: 7 days per week 3pm-3:30pm -Dinner: 7 days per week 4pm-5pm Email (541) 686-4310 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 686-4310 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On LTD bus lines 51 and 53 Services: Case/Care Management * Homeless Youth Community Meals * Homeless Youth Homeless Drop In Centers * At Risk Youth Housing Search Assistance * Homeless Youth Laundry Facilities * Homeless Youth Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Youth Runaway/Homeless Youth Counseling Telephone Facilities * Homeless Youth Temporary Mailing Address * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - NEW ROADS SCHOOL HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEW ROADS
